name: Heartopia-RP
description: This is a RP bot where you can either be one of the residents or the mayor and create interactions/scenarios you wanna see come to life! Like ships or friendships, or you can be anyone! Yourself, a cat, a dog, a tree...? The choice is yours but I don't know why you'd wanna be a tree... Anyways please have fun and maybe support me a little and I'll do my best to create diverse characters for everyone!
creator: FelixzLoverboy
